summary: Database replication between CUCM cluster nodes has changed from Good to Bad. Configuration changes may not replicate correctly across the cluster.
customer_impact: Configuration changes may not replicate across cluster nodes. Cluster health is degraded.
recommendation: Validate database replication immediately. Verify network connectivity and NTP synchronization before restarting any services.
jira: Investigated DBReplicationFailure RTMT alert. Verified replication status, database services, and cluster communication. Further monitoring is in progress.
